headline: UBS Trims Aflac (AFL) Target, Sees “Limited Wiggle-Room” in Current Environment
summary: Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 9, UBS lowered its price recommendation on Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) to $114 from $116. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The update came as part of a Q1 earnings preview for the North American life insurance group. […]

headline: Is Aflac (AFL) Pricing Reflect Its Strong Multi‑Year Run And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Aflac's share price lines up with its real worth, or if the market is missing something important about this insurer. Aflac's stock closed at US$113.07, with returns of 2.3% over the last week, 2.5% over the last month, 2.6% year to date and 10.4% over the past year, along with 82.1% over 3 years and 140.0% over 5 years. These returns sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in major US insurers, as investors continue to watch how established brands...
